message: Update to 1.3.0 - Bio-Synth Medical Heart Viewer (glass myocardium, conduction, layers).
releaseNotes: 1.3.0 - Medical Heart Viewer: glass myocardium, color-coded vessels/valves, SA-AV-His-Purkinje impulse, coronary layer, hierarchy + isolate/explode/slice/measure, MI/arrhythmia focus hooks, Blender glTF + UE5 scaffold. Procedural geometry ships now; drop public/models/heart/heart.glb to upgrade assets.
